languages.text: "Изуверство. Посметь отлучать священный металл от плоти слуги Бога-Машины... Сотворивших сие ждет анафема. Я исторгну из них Движущую Силу, а плоть обращу в расходный биоматериал". {n}С глубокой скорбью во взоре Эоганн левитирует рядом с мучеником. Из форсунков его алембика начинает сочиться мягкий пар, отдающий сладковатым привкусом анестетика.{/n}

"Heresy. To dare sever sacred metal from the flesh of the Machine God's servant... Damnation upon those who committed this deed. I will purge the Motive Force from their bodies and grind their flesh into disposable biomatter." {n}With anguish in his eyes, Eogunn levitates beside the poor soul. A gentle mist starts pouring from his alembic, carrying the sweet scent of an anaesthetic.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Изуверство. Посметь отлучать священный металл от плоти слуги Бога-Машины... Сотворивших сие ждет анафема. Я исторгну из них Движущую Силу, а плоть обращу в расходный биоматериал". {n}С глубокой скорбью во взоре Эоганн левитирует рядом с мучеником. languages.text: «Herejía. Osar cortar el metal sagrado de la carne de un sirviente del Dios Máquina... La condenación espera a quienes hayan cometido este acto. Purgaré la Fuerza Motriz de sus cuerpos y trituraré su carne en biomateria desechable». {n}Con dolor en los ojos, Eogunn levita junto a la víctima. Una niebla agradable empieza a brotar de su alambique con el dulce aroma de un anestésico.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Heresy. To dare sever sacred metal from the flesh of the Machine God's servant... Damnation upon those who committed this deed. I will purge the Motive Force from their bodies and grind their flesh into disposable biomatter." {n}With anguish in his eyes, Eogunn levitates beside the poor soul. A gentle mist starts pouring from his alembic, carrying the sweet scent of an anaesthetic.{/n}

Purgaré la Fuerza Motriz de sus cuerpos y trituraré su carne en biomateria desechable». {n}Con dolor en los ojos, Eogunn levita junto a la víctima. Una niebla agradable empieza a brotar de su alambique con el dulce aroma de un anestésico.{/n}

languages.text: “异端。胆敢将圣铁从万机之神仆从的血肉之中强行剥离……愿诅咒降临在罪魁祸首身上。我会把他们体内的源力彻底清除，将他们的血肉碾成可弃置的生物材料。”{n}伊奥贡的眼中流露出痛苦之色，缓缓漂浮到那可怜人身旁。一股轻柔的雾气从他的蒸馏器中喷出，带着麻醉剂特有的甜香。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Heresy. To dare sever sacred metal from the flesh of the Machine God's servant... Damnation upon those who committed this deed. I will purge the Motive Force from their bodies and grind their flesh into disposable biomatter." {n}With anguish in his eyes, Eogunn levitates beside the poor soul. A gentle mist starts pouring from his alembic, carrying the sweet scent of an anaesthetic.{/n}

languages.text: "Ketzerei. Zu wagen, heiliges Metall aus dem Fleisch eines Dieners des Maschinengottes zu reißen ... Verdammt sollen die Urheber dieser Tat sein! Ich werde die Antriebskraft aus ihren Leibern holen und ihr Fleisch als Biomaterie entsorgen." {n}Mit einem traurigen Ausdruck in seinen Augen schwebt Eogunn neben die arme Seele. Ein sanfter Nebel entsteigt seinem Kolben und verbreitet den süßen Duft eines Betäubungsmittels.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Heresy. To dare sever sacred metal from the flesh of the Machine God's servant... Damnation upon those who committed this deed. I will purge the Motive Force from their bodies and grind their flesh into disposable biomatter." {n}With anguish in his eyes, Eogunn levitates beside the poor soul. A gentle mist starts pouring from his alembic, carrying the sweet scent of an anaesthetic.{/n}

Ein sanfter Nebel entsteigt seinem Kolben und verbreitet den süßen Duft eines Betäubungsmittels.{/n}

languages.text: « Hérésie. Oser séparer le métal sacré de la chair d'un serviteur du Dieu-Machine... Maudits soient ceux qui ont commis un tel sacrilège. J'expurgerai la Force Motrice de leurs corps impies et je réduirai leur chair à l'état de vulgaire biomatière. » {n}Le regard dolent, Eogunn lévite à côté du malheureux et une brume vaporeuse se déverse de son alambic emportant dans son sillage l'odeur douceâtre d'un anesthésiant.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Heresy. To dare sever sacred metal from the flesh of the Machine God's servant... Damnation upon those who committed this deed. I will purge the Motive Force from their bodies and grind their flesh into disposable biomatter." {n}With anguish in his eyes, Eogunn levitates beside the poor soul. A gentle mist starts pouring from his alembic, carrying the sweet scent of an anaesthetic.{/n}

languages.text: "Kâfirlik. Makine Tanrı'nın hizmetkârının etinden kutsal metali ayırmaya cüret etmek... Bu eylemi gerçekleştirenlere lanet olsun. Bedenlerinden Devinim Gücü'nü söküp atacak ve etlerini tek kullanımlık biyomaddeye dönüştüreceğim." {n}Gözleri kederlenen Eogunn, zavallı ruhun yanında süzülüyor. İmbiğinden anestezik maddelerin tatlı kokusunu taşıyan hafif bir sis yayılmaya başlıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Heresy. To dare sever sacred metal from the flesh of the Machine God's servant... Damnation upon those who committed this deed. A gentle mist starts pouring from his alembic, carrying the sweet scent of an anaesthetic.{/n}

Bedenlerinden Devinim Gücü'nü söküp atacak ve etlerini tek kullanımlık biyomaddeye dönüştüreceğim." {n}Gözleri kederlenen Eogunn, zavallı ruhun yanında süzülüyor. languages.text: 「異端。機械神に仕える者の肉から聖なる金属を敢えて切り離すとは…この行為を犯した者たちへの罰は、動機を彼らの体から取り除き、肉を廃棄用のバイオマターにすり潰すことだ。」{n}苦痛に満ちた眼差しで、エオグンはその魂のそばに浮かび上がる。彼の蒸留器から、甘い麻酔の香りを帯びた霧が流れ始める。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Heresy. To dare sever sacred metal from the flesh of the Machine God's servant... Damnation upon those who committed this deed. A gentle mist starts pouring from his alembic, carrying the sweet scent of an anaesthetic.{/n}
